score_evidence.completeness: phases array contains all 6 SOW scope_phases with start/end dates, duration_weeks, deliverables list, and milestone name. milestone_dates covers: M1_contract_signing, M2_concept_approved, M3_executive_plans_approved, M4_permits_obtained, construction_start_estimated, construction_completion_estimated. dependencies map is complete (phase_2 through phase_6 each maps to predecessor). Score 5.
score_evidence.accuracy: Timeline realistic for hotel project: total design timeline ~48 weeks (Phase 1-4). Phase 6 permitting 17 weeks (scope SOW said 10-24, so 17 is within range). Construction estimate: 2027-06-01 to 2029-06-01 = 2 years — realistic for 3,000 sqm commercial hotel. Phase durations all within SOW-stated ranges: Phase 1=7 (range 6-8) ✓, Phase 2=14 (range 12-16) ✓, Phase 3=9 (range 8-10) ✓, Phase 4=9 (range 8-10) ✓, Phase 5=5 (range 4-6) ✓, Phase 6=17 (range 10-24) ✓. All ISO-8601 dates. No dependency inversions. Score 5.
score_evidence.clarity: Each phase has named milestone and target dates. Critical path is implicitly visible (sequential phases). Not explicitly marked as critical path — deduction. Score 4.
score_evidence.state_sync: No Asana state field in deliverable. Simulated run. Score 3.
score_evidence.timing: Schedule produced after all three activation conditions (contract signed per DG-06, site docs requested per Sol's report, deposit M1 confirmed per DG-06 Marcela note). Score 5.

decision_commentary: Strong project schedule. All 6 SOW phases represented with realistic durations validated against SOW ranges. Milestone dates complete including construction timeline. Dependencies graph complete. Minor deduction: critical path not explicitly labeled (clarity=4). State sync scored 3 per simulated run convention. No auto-fail conditions triggered (phases array present, milestone_dates present, schedule produced after activation conditions met).
